exploration_notes:
Found 12 key files covering all aspects of CronJob API handling across v1beta1 and batch/v1:

**Conversion functions**: `pkg/apis/batch/v1beta1/conversion.go` (field label conversions for v1beta1 CronJob), `pkg/apis/batch/v1/conversion.go` (field label conversions + manual JobSpec conversion functions needed due to v1beta1→v1 dependency), and their auto-generated counterparts `zz_generated.conversion.go` in both version directories (containing CronJob/CronJobSpec/CronJobStatus conversion functio
